title: Graceful Degradation
concept: Returning clear error strings instead of throwing system-level exceptions, letting the agent decide how to adapt.

exercises.prompt: Quick start! When an AI agent uses a tool (like a calculator or web search), what is that tool basically doing for the agent?

options.text: Doing a specific job the agent can't do on its own
Making the agent slower on purpose

exercises.explain: Tools are like helpers the agent calls on for specific jobs, such as math or looking things up. The agent stays in charge and just uses the tool's result.

cards.title: When a tool breaks mid-task
cards.body: An AI agent asks a weather tool for tomorrow's forecast, but the tool crashes. Does the whole agent freeze, or does it calmly try something else?

cards.title: Graceful degradation
cards.body: When a tool fails, it returns a clear error message (a plain string) instead of crashing the whole program. This lets the agent read the message and decide how to adapt.

cards.title: A soft landing, not a fall
cards.body: A crash is like a climber's rope snapping with no warning. A clear error string is like the rope saying 'I'm frayed, grab the next hold.' The climber can react instead of falling.

cards.title: Two ways to fail
cards.body: Bad: the weather tool throws a system error and the agent stops cold. Good: the tool returns 'Error: weather service is down.' The agent reads it and replies, 'I couldn't get the forecast, want me to try again later?'

cards.title: Myth: errors should stop everything
cards.body: Not for agents! A hard crash gives the agent nothing to work with. A clear error string keeps the agent alive and able to choose a backup plan.

cards.title: Crash vs. clear message
cards.body: Same failure, very different results for the agent.

left.text: Program halts; agent has no info and can't recover.

right.text: Agent reads the message and picks a new plan.

exercises.prompt: A file-reading tool can't find the file. Which response helps the agent degrade gracefully?

options.text: Return the string: 'Error: file not found, please check the name.'
Throw a system exception that halts the whole program
Return nothing at all and stay silent
Freeze forever while waiting for the file

exercises.explain: A clear error string tells the agent exactly what went wrong, so it can ask for a corrected name or try another approach. Crashing or silence leaves the agent stuck with no way to adapt.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Returning a clear error string lets the agent decide how to adapt, while throwing a system-level exception can stop it completely.
exercises.explain: True! The error string keeps the agent informed and in control. A thrown exception can halt everything before the agent even gets a chance to react.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank about graceful degradation.
exercises.sentence: Instead of crashing, a good tool returns a clear error string so the agent can adapt.
exercises.explain: The whole point of graceful degradation is that the agent stays alive and can adapt, choosing a backup plan instead of shutting down.

exercises.prompt: A search tool fails. Which reply looks like an AI agent handling it gracefully after reading an error string?

options.text: The search service isn't responding right now. Want me to retry, or should I answer from what I already know?

exercises.explain: The AI agent read a clear error, explained the problem in plain words, and offered next steps. The raw crash code and the silence show a tool that failed without letting the agent adapt.

exercises.prompt: An agent calls a currency-conversion tool that suddenly goes offline. You are designing the tool. To support graceful degradation, what should the tool do AND why?

options.text: Return a clear error string like 'Error: conversion service offline,' so the agent can tell the user and offer to retry or estimate
Throw a system exception, because stopping the whole program is the safest choice
Return a random made-up exchange rate, so the task never appears to fail
Return nothing, so the agent quietly moves on without noticing

exercises.explain: Graceful degradation means a failing tool hands the agent a clear, readable error string instead of crashing, going silent, or faking data. That message keeps the agent informed and in control, so it can adapt: retry, explain to the user, or switch to a backup. A thrown exception can halt everything, silence hides the problem, and fake data is dangerous. Clear communication is what lets an agent recover with a soft landing.
